channel.title: Posts on The Sprawl
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on The Sprawl

item.title: Neue Blog Engine
item.description: Das Blog wurde auf github portiert

item.title: Xignal Mousetrap
item.description: Ein wunderbares Beispiel für die Einsatzmöglichkeiten von LoraWan. Through the LoRa technology the communication runs via your private network (LoRa Gateway). The end-to-end solution of Xignal, from sensor to online portal, is easy to use.Xignal communicate the status of the trap: armed, un-armed and un-armed with catch. You can view the status via our online portal (my.xignal.com) or — Weiterlesen www.xignal.com/products/xignal-mousetrap
item.content:encoded:
Ein wunderbares Beispiel für die Einsatzmöglichkeiten von LoraWan.

Through the LoRa technology the communication runs via your private network (LoRa Gateway). The end-to-end solution of Xignal, from sensor to online portal, is easy to use.Xignal communicate the status of the trap: armed, un-armed and un-armed with catch. You can view the status via our online portal (my.xignal.com) or — Weiterlesen www.xignal.com/products/xignal-mousetrap

item.title: Terror Hitler Corona Anthroposophie Blog
item.description: Lesenswerter Artikel zum Thema Waldorf-Schulen und der Wirren Gedankenwelt in der Ecke. Namen tanzen ist zwar lustig aber halt nur die Spitze des Eisberges. Neu im Blog: Wie erkläre ich Kindern die Pandemie? “Unsere Zeitung” von der Waldorfschule Sorsum meint: Mit einem Mix aus 9/11, Impfzwang und Bill Gates, Überwachung, Reinkarnation und Erzengeln, Zahlenmagie, Astrologie und Hitler. — Weiterlesen anthroposophie.blog/2020/05/15/terror-hitler-corona/
item.content:encoded:
Lesenswerter Artikel zum Thema Waldorf-Schulen und der Wirren Gedankenwelt in der Ecke. Namen tanzen ist zwar lustig aber halt nur die Spitze des Eisberges.

Neu im Blog: Wie erkläre ich Kindern die Pandemie? “Unsere Zeitung” von der Waldorfschule Sorsum meint: Mit einem Mix aus 9/11, Impfzwang und Bill Gates, Überwachung, Reinkarnation und Erzengeln, Zahlenmagie, Astrologie und Hitler. — Weiterlesen anthroposophie.blog/2020/05/15/terror-hitler-corona/

item.title: Szenen Einer Ehe
item.description: A: Alles ok bei Dir? B: Ich musste nur kurz in der Nase popeln A: Title of your Sextape
item.content:encoded:
• A: Alles ok bei Dir?
  • B: Ich musste nur kurz in der Nase popeln
  • A: Title of your Sextape

item.title: Foo Fighters Unleash the Colour and the Shape 23 Years Ago Today
item.description: Immer noch in meiner Top10 When Dave Grohl and the Foo Fighters released ‘The Colour and the Shape’ on May 20, 1997, their career – and the state of rock music – was changed. — Weiterlesen www.rockcellarmagazine.com/foo-fighters-the-colour-and-the-shape-retrospective-dave-grohl/
item.content:encoded:
Immer noch in meiner Top10

When Dave Grohl and the Foo Fighters released ‘The Colour and the Shape’ on May 20, 1997, their career – and the state of rock music – was changed. — Weiterlesen www.rockcellarmagazine.com/foo-fighters-the-colour-and-the-shape-retrospective-dave-grohl/

item.description: some results without a block echo "a bash source block" function hello { echo Hello World! } hello block caption a source block without a language echo a source block with results a source block with results a source block that only exports results but the result block is an example block with multiple lines including empty lines! it also has multiple parameters src, example & export blocks treat their content as raw text /inline/ *markup* is ignored and whitespace is honored and not removed content of example blocks is still html escaped - see <script>alert("escaped")</script> examples like this are also supported note that /inline/ *markup* ignored Mongodb is webscale.
item.content:encoded:
some results without a block

a source block without a language
echo a source block with results
a source block with results

a source block that only exports results

but the result block is

an example block with
multiple lines including


empty lines!

it also has multiple parameters

src, example & export blocks treat their content as raw text
/inline/ *markup* is ignored
      and whitespace is honored and not removed

content of example blocks is still html escaped - see <script>alert("escaped")</script>

examples like this
are also supported

note that /inline/ *markup* ignored

Mongodb is webscale. (source: mongodb-is-web-scale)

blocks like the quote block parse their content and can contain

  • lists
  • inline markup

  • tables

    foo
    bar
    baz
  • paragraphs
  • … whitespace is honored and not removed (but is not displayed because that's how html works by default) it can be made visible using css (e.g. white-space: pre).
  #+BEGIN_SRC bash
  echo src (with language org) and example blocks support escaping using commata
  #+END_SRC

,* I am not a real headline - commata escape characters aren't renderered
  #+BEGIN_SRC bash
  echo src (with language org) and example blocks support escaping using commata
  #+END_SRC

,* I am not a real headline - commata escape characters aren't renderered

  • list item 1 blocks can contain unindented lines that would normally end a list item

    this line is not indented - if it was outside of a block the list item would end

    this line is not indented - if it was outside of a block the list item would end

    now we're outside the block again and the following unindented line will be outside of the list item

this unindented line is outside of the list item

  • list item 2

    #+BEGIN_EXAMPLE

    #+END_EXAMPLE

    #+END_QUOTE

  • verse blocks

    • emacs / ox-hugo rendering

      Great clouds overhead
      Tiny black birds rise and fall
      Snow covers Emacs

         ---AlexSchroeder

    • go-org rendering

      <style>
.verse-block p { white-space: pre; }
.verse-block p + p { margin: 0; }
</style>

      Great clouds overhead Tiny black birds rise and fall Snow covers Emacs

      —AlexSchroeder
